title: Personal Injury Demand Letter — CV-2024-08841
text:
DEMAND LETTER

Re: Personal Injury Claim — John Mitchell v. Pacific Coast Insurance Group
Case No. CV-2024-08841

Dear Claims Adjuster,

I am writing on behalf of my client, John Mitchell, regarding the above-referenced personal injury claim. The accident occurred on March 14, 2024, at the intersection of Harbor Boulevard and Westminster Avenue in Garden Grove, California.

LIABILITY

The facts clearly establish that your insured was solely at fault. The police report, attached as Exhibit A, confirms the citation for reckless driving. The plaintiff maintains that liability is not in dispute. The undersigned has reviewed all evidence.

INJURIES AND TREATMENT

Mr. Mitchell was transported by ambulance to Springfield General Hospital, where he was treated by Dr. Sarah Chen. He sustained a cervical strain and lumbar disc herniation at L4-L5. Following discharge, his brother Robert Vance accompanied him to follow-up appointments. Contact the office at (555) 401-2938 for records.

DAMAGES

Medical expenses (Springfield General Hospital): $12,340.00
Physical therapy (48 sessions): $9,600.00
Total medical damages: $45,750.00
Lost wages: $15,200.00

DEMAND

We hereby demand $150,000.00 pursuant to Policy No. AIG-4471-XJ.

Sincerely,
Attorney at Law
